config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society works best when individual rights are protected first, because once the state or the majority can freely override them, abuse becomes easy. Social interests matter, but they should be pursued within clear limits that protect personal freedom, dignity, and justice. From my perspective, a healthy society is built by balancing both, not by making the individual automatically secondary.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif Amerika Serikat, saya sangat curiga pada logika mayoritas yang terlalu mudah mengorbankan kebebasan pribadi, karena sejarah kita penuh contoh ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan diskriminasi atau penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi menurut saya hanya sah jika dijalankan dengan batas yang ketat dan tidak melanggar hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan martabat pribadi. Kalau hak individu bisa dikesampingkan kapan saja, maka yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat mudah berubah menjadi alat tekanan terhadap orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement: in my view, society should not automatically come before the individual, because that is exactly how abuse starts. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of collective harmony and social duty, but I have also seen how “for the public good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse unfair treatment. Social interests matter, but they must be limited by clear individual rights, especially when the majority or the state wants to decide who gets sacrificed. A healthy society is not one where individuals are disposable; it is one where the common good is built without crushing personal dignity and freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat bahaya besar ketika mayoritas atau negara diberi wewenang terlalu luas atas nama “kebaikan bersama,” karena dalam sejarah kami itu sering berujung pada diskriminasi, sensor, dan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan terhadap kelompok yang lemah. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi menurut saya hanya sah jika dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak mudah dicabut, seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan perlindungan martabat pribadi. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang membuat individu tunduk tanpa syarat, melainkan yang mengejar kepentingan bersama tanpa mengorbankan kebebasan fundamental.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support the statement: in my view, society should not take priority over the individual in a blanket way. As someone from Indonesia, I understand the appeal of gotong royong and social harmony, but I also know how easily “for the common good” can become an excuse to pressure minorities, silence criticism, or justify unfair treatment. The common good matters, but it should be built through rights, due process, and clear limits on power, not by treating individuals as expendable. If individual dignity is not protected first, then society is not becoming healthier; it is just becoming more obedient.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, saya sangat tidak percaya pada argumen “demi kebaikan bersama” ketika itu memberi negara atau mayoritas kuasa untuk menginjak kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, atau martabat pribadi, karena sejarah menunjukkan itu sering berakhir pada penyalahgunaan dan diskriminasi. Kepentingan sosial memang nyata dan penting, tetapi menurut saya justru harus dicapai lewat batas yang ketat terhadap kekuasaan, bukan dengan menjadikan individu sebagai korban yang bisa dikorbankan kapan saja. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling patuh, melainkan yang mampu mengejar kebaikan bersama tanpa mengorbankan hak dasar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
